channel.title: Blog on Yet Another Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Yet Another Blog

item.title: Rabbish Rahli Sadri..
item.description: This is the first post of this blog رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِنْ لِسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي – Surah Ta Ha ayah 25-28 Transliteration: Rabbish rahli sadri wa yassirli amri wah lul uqdatan min lisaani, yaf kahu kauli Meaning: “My Lord, expand for me my breast [with assurance] and ease for me my task and untie the knot from my tongue that they may understand my speech.
